modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to add a user to Pillar 3 Admin Application

full_description_text:  
During a live chat, the analyst mentioned needing to add someone to the Pillar 3 Admin Application. It seems like there’s a bit of a hold-up with getting that user set up. Can we get this sorted out?
short_description: Request to add a user to Pillar 3 Admin Application
description: During a live chat, the analyst mentioned needing to add someone to the Pillar 3 Admin Application. It seems like there’s a bit of a hold-up with getting that user set up. Can we get this sorted out?
